Video.summary: This Small Block Ford receives big power upgrades.
Video.title: 410ci Stroker Windsor

Video.summary: We’re expecting great numbers in the dyno cell for the 410ci Small Block Ford.
Video.title: Stroker Windsor Dyno Test

Video.summary: Dig's Rod Shop unveils a '47 Chevy pickup: a "Zey Bronze" stunner with 640hp and unique barn wood details.
Video.title: Digs Rod Shop - 1947 Chevy 3100

Video.summary: Shane Lile's purple-over-red '55 Chevy Bel Air Gasser: an eye-popping, custom drag strip beast!
Video.title: Shane Lile - Gasshole

Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're doing a multi-stage 212 CC go-kart engine build to show how to have fun on a budget.
Video.title: Single Cylinder Special

Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: Out of the shop and into the yard! We take a weekend to rebuild a 350ci small block Chevy V8.
Video.title: Backyard Engine Build

Video.summary: We take the 350ci Small Block Chevy built in the parking lot and upgrade short block assembly.
Video.title: Backyard Build Upgrades

Video.summary: We finish our 350 Small Block Chevy with high-performance induction, then put it to the test.
Video.title: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Image.alt: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Video.summary: We built a stock-looking pump-gas 534 BBC sleeper with big torque and power, swap-ready and dyno-tested.
Video.title: Sleeper 534 Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie machine a beastly Small Block Ford for serious pump-gas track power.
Video.title: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Image.alt: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Video.summary: Our 460 Big Block Ford is back! We upgrade it with a weight saving, better flowing induction.
Video.title: Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford
Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford
Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford

Video.summary: We dyno test a custom-built 5.3 LS crate engine and talk in-depth about the importance of quality fasteners.
Video.title: Crate Horsepower

Video.summary: We put our past engine builds to the test now that they have been installed in awesome hot rods!
Video.title: Chassis Dyno Mania

Video.summary: Engine Power gets the honor of rebuilding the 640 inch blown nitrous injected V8.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 1

Video.summary: The team visits Kaase Racing to machine the 429 inch Ford big block from the first monster truck, Big Foot #1.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 2

Video.summary: Mike and Pat assemble and dyno tune massive 640 cubic inch tri-power 429 Ford with 871 blower and nitrous.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 3

Video.summary: The first of a 3 stage build of the durable small block Chevy.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage I

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage I
In House Power Mouse: Stage I
In House Power Mouse: Stage I

Video.summary: Stage II of our small block Chevy build gets block modifications.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Video.summary: Pat and Mike button up their Gen III Hemi with super trick heads, then it's tech tip time with Mike and Pat.
Video.title: Hemi Top End Magic

Video.summary: In Stage 3 of our small-block build, our 383 becomes a 406.
Video.title: In-House Power Mouse Roars

Video.summary: After 23 years in retirement, original BigFoot monster truck comes alive.
Video.title: BigFoot Lives

Video.summary: The guys visit DBR Performance and their first chance ever to drive a Jeep TrackHawk.
Video.title: TrashHawk

Video.summary: Our Jeep TrashHawk gets the upgraded axles, brakes, and suspension it will need to handle 707 horses.
Video.title: Suspension of Jeep Belief

Video.summary: Behold "Outlaw" VIN #1! Mustang Brothers' supercharged '67 Fastback is a Brittany Blue beast.
Video.title: Mustang Brothers

Video.summary: Prepare to be floored by this 1946 Dodge Power Wagon resto-mod from Vintage Dream Machines.
Video.title: Power Wagon

Video.summary: It’s time for some high performance fun at the National Corvette Museum Motorsports Park track.
Video.title: Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track

Image.alt: Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track
Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track
Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track

Video.summary: The OBS 632 is getting fuel and brake lines, custom exhaust, a stripped cab, and bed mods.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 4 Taking Shape

Video.summary: We build a Ford 9-inch for the OBS Chevy and show an inexpensive interior panel color change.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Video.summary: The OBS Chevy chassis is back from powder coat. We start assembly to get the sport truck running again.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Video.summary: Our 632 SS project nears completion with battery relocation, interior refurbishment, and traction control.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Video.summary: Our 632 Chevy is almost done! We're finishing the interior, adding exterior details, then hitting the road.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Video.summary: We’re at Stovalls collision and wrecking service searching for a 4 wheel drive square body.
Video.title: How To Choose A Square Body

Image.alt: How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body

Video.summary: We picked up a 1985 Chevy K-10 with a plan to do a full rebuild.
Video.title: Hip to be Square Body

Video.summary: We lay out our plan to rebuild our 1985 Chevy K-10.
Video.title: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Image.alt: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Video.summary: The transformation continues on this clean '85 K-10 square body.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown

Video.summary: Our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body gets stripped, sanded and primed. Then we add a two-tone paint job.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint

Video.summary: The frame work for our 1985 Chevy K-10 is being blasted and painted.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Video.summary: We start reassembling our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body. We add steering, brakes, exhaust, and glass.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly

Video.summary: Our K-10 Square body is coming back to life with restoration parts, cooling, and electrical.
Video.title: Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Image.alt: Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive
Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive
Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Video.summary: We wrap up our Chevy K-10 square body build with the final assembly of trim work, bumpers, and more
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished

Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished

Video.summary: Transforming a stock Jeep Wrangler to look and perform better than the Tomb Raider 2 Jeep.
Video.title: Project Tomb Raider PT. 1

Video.summary: Continuing the transformation of our Jeep TJ into a rig worthy of Tomb Raider 2.
Video.title: Project Tomb Raider PT. 2

Video.summary: Final steps of Project Tomb Raider: snorkel, bumpers, and winch.
Video.title: Project Tomb Raider PT. 3

Video.summary: Our Big Block Chevy gets ready for life inside a high-revving hot rod.
Video.title: Hot Rod Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: Assembly on the 4.3L engine begins with a solid bottom end.
Video.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 Bottom End Build

Video.summary: The 4.3L engine shows what it can do in the dyno cell!
Video.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 on the Dyno

Video.summary: We crank up the power on our old-school GM 4.3L V6 with some turbocharged forced induction.
Video.title: Turbocharging the GM 4.3L V6

Video.summary: How-to build a modern Chevy stroker starting from scratch with an LQ4 iron truck block.
Video.title: Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker

Image.alt: Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker
Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker
Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker

Video.summary: The latest GenX cylinder heads are flowed, installed and topped off with multi-port fuel injection
Video.title: Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads

Image.alt: Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads
Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads
Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads

Video.summary: How to turbo-charge an iron block LS stroker to make 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: Iron Animal 408: Wicked Turbo Power

Video.summary: Team creates over-the-top street/strip pickup wedging a nitrous-powered 427 big block into a compact S10.
Video.title: Lime Dime: 427 Big Block

Video.summary: How-to bolt on 150 HP with a wet-nitrous system, install a bed-mounted radiator and index J-wire spark plugs.
Video.title: Lime Dime: More Power

Video.summary: Team dials in Lime Dime drag truck at the strip.
Video.title: Race Track Tuning
